final:
module RefModule (
    input [7:0] data_in,
    input clk,
    input clear,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (clear) begin
        data_out <= 8'b0;
    end else begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end
end

endmodule
